query:
UPDATE inventory i
INNER JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
INNER JOIN products p2 ON p.sku = p2.sku AND p2.tenantId = i.tenantId
SET i.productId = p2.id
WHERE p.tenantId != i.tenantId;
